headline: QuickBooks Workforce Launch Expands Intuit’s (INTU) Push Into AI-Powered Human Capital Management
summary: Intuit introduced QuickBooks Workforce, a new AI-driven workforce management platform designed to consolidate payroll, HR, recruiting, benefits, and employee management tools for small and mid-sized businesses. Key Investor TakeawaysIntuit Inc.

raw.headline: QuickBooks Workforce Launch Expands Intuit’s (INTU) Push Into AI-Powered Human Capital Management

headline: Vestwell Selected by Intuit as Exclusive Partner to Deliver QuickBooks 401(k) to Millions of Small and Mid-Market Businesses
summary: Today, Vestwell, the backbone of the modern savings economy, announced it has been selected as the exclusive partner for QuickBooks 401(k), a retirement savings offering built for QuickBooks Workforce business customers.1 Embedded directly into QuickBooks Workforce, the offering enables small and mid-market businesses to provide flexible and scalable retirement benefits through the platform they will already be using to manage payroll, finances, and human capital management.

headline: Intuit Unveils QuickBooks Workforce, Radically Transforming Human Capital Management for Small and Mid-Market Businesses
summary: MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., May 06, 2026--Intuit (NASDAQ: INTU), the global financial technology platform that makes Intuit TurboTax, Credit Karma, QuickBooks, Mailchimp and Intuit Enterprise Suite, today announced QuickBooks Workforce in the U.S., a new, end-to-end solution powered by agentic AI and human expertise, that radically transforms how small and mid-market businesses run their human capital management (HCM).
